coverage_note: The bundled SOX10 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from SOX10 melanocyte development, melanin synthesis and trafficking, hair-follicle pigmentation, melanocyte stem-cell maintenance, and graying biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000100146: SOX10 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: SOX10 findings should be read against melanocyte development, melanin synthesis and trafficking, hair-follicle pigmentation, melanocyte stem-cell maintenance, and graying biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

SOX10 pigmentation variation model is curated as a SOX10 marker for Hair pigmentation, skin pigmentation, and graying research context, Melanocyte development, survival, and melanosome biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

SOX10 regulatory expression context model is curated as a SOX10 marker for Hair pigmentation, skin pigmentation, and graying research context, Melanocyte development, survival, and melanosome biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
